single_spawn_policy.goal: complete all assigned witnesses in one worker spawn
continue_without_confirmation: proof plan mismatch that can be repaired locally
allowed_local_repairs: add proved case_lib helpers ending with helper_namespace.suffix
add official Rocq library imports needed by current group helpers/proofs
create and rerun debug scripts under tooling.coqtop_debug_script
terminal_blocked_only_for: assigned witness statement malformed or missing
required premise cannot be derived from assigned VC or current case_lib after concrete attempts
fixed coq_tooling command cannot run after command evidence

state_reports.stale: report stale when source_goal_version is no longer current
state_reports.compact_error: report compact-error only as a compaction fact; controller/main decides retry or final blocker

single_spawn_policy.controller_acceptance_model: parent verify validates merged proof after worker returns

tooling.coq_tooling_check_command: python3 /home/yangfp/QCIP/.agents/skills/vc-proving/scripts/coq_tooling.py check --workspace-root /home/yangfp/QCIP/worktrees/xizi_double_link_next-20260714180011/xizi_double_link_next-vc-proving-r1/group_00__next_return_by_suffix_cases --build-workspace /home/yangfp/QCIP/worktrees/xizi_double_link_next-20260714180011/_coq_builds/xizi_double_link_next-vc-proving-r1/group_00__next_return_by_suffix_cases/src --target-file .coq_group_checks/xizi_double_link_next_group_00__next_return_by_suffix_cases_check.v --target-kind group-check --source-goal-version 9a8bcb26165cefb333598a9c10b8b6d1de0816df881a068d28098d80c39d8bc5 --group-check-case-theory SimpleC.EE.INPUT.xizi.xizi_double_link_next --group-check-require xizi_double_link_next_goal --group-check-require xizi_double_link_next_proof_auto --group-check-require xizi_double_link_next_proof_manual --assigned-witness proof_of_xizi_double_link_next_return_wit_1 --assigned-witness proof_of_xizi_double_link_next_return_wit_2
tooling.proof_manual_check_reason: worker group evidence must use build-workspace-only group-check; parent verify runs full goal_check

group_manifest.proof_strategy: For each witness unfold the return-witness definition, select the second disjunct, introduce parameters, destruct suffix, unfold xizi_dll_suffix in PreH4 and reduce xizi_dll_next_result. In return_wit_1 the nil case yields zero and the cons case contradicts PreH1; in return_wit_2 the nil case contradicts PreH1 and the cons case yields the required next equality. Preserve both xizi_dllseg conjuncts by identity/cancellation.

group_entry.proof_strategy: For each witness unfold the return-witness definition, select the second disjunct, introduce parameters, destruct suffix, unfold xizi_dll_suffix in PreH4 and reduce xizi_dll_next_result. In return_wit_1 the nil case yields zero and the cons case contradicts PreH1; in return_wit_2 the nil case contradicts PreH1 and the cons case yields the required next equality. Preserve both xizi_dllseg conjuncts by identity/cancellation.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_next_return_wi: right; intros; destruct suffix; nil closes by next-result reduction and spatial identity; cons closes by contradiction between PreH1 and the cons clause of PreH4
right; intros; destruct suffix; nil contradicts PreH1 via the nil clause of PreH4; cons obtains next = head-of-suffix from PreH4; cancel the unchanged segment pair

vc_shape.common_pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist_pre linklist_node_pre before prefix ** xizi_dllseg next linklist_node_pre linklist_pre last suffix
vc_shape.common_post_spatial: the identical pair of xizi_dllseg resources
vc_shape.pure_split: return_wit_1 proves zero result under next=sentinel; return_wit_2 proves next result under next<>sentinel

group_entry.space_plan: Frame/cancel both xizi_dllseg predicates unchanged; no segment decomposition is required.
group_entry.pure_plan: Destruct suffix, unfold the suffix relation and result function, and use exactly PreH1 plus the appropriate clause of PreH4.

premise_discharge.definitions: xizi_dll_suffix and xizi_dll_next_result reduce on suffix
premise_discharge.empty_nonempty_branch_facts: from PreH1 and the nil/cons clauses of PreH4
premise_discharge.spatial: identity of the two xizi_dllseg resources

group_entry.grouping_reason: Both target witnesses share a single suffix-destructor and framing proof pattern, require no helper declarations, and fit within max_witnesses_per_group=12.

per_witness_plan.proof_of_xizi_double_link_next_return_wi: right; intros; destruct suffix; nil closes by next-result reduction and spatial identity; cons closes by contradiction between PreH1 and the cons clause of PreH4
right; intros; destruct suffix; nil contradicts PreH1 via the nil clause of PreH4; cons obtains next = head-of-suffix from PreH4; cancel the unchanged segment pair

vc_shape.common_pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist_pre linklist_node_pre before prefix ** xizi_dllseg next linklist_node_pre linklist_pre last suffix
vc_shape.common_post_spatial: the identical pair of xizi_dllseg resources
vc_shape.pure_split: return_wit_1 proves zero result under next=sentinel; return_wit_2 proves next result under next<>sentinel

vc_checking_plan.space_plan: Frame/cancel both xizi_dllseg predicates unchanged; no segment decomposition is required.
vc_checking_plan.pure_plan: Destruct suffix, unfold the suffix relation and result function, and use exactly PreH1 plus the appropriate clause of PreH4.

handoff.rendered_instructions_compact:
Read /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_double_link_next-20260714180011/rounds/xizi_double_link_next-vc-proving-r1/groups/group_00__next_return_by_suffix_cases/group_worker_input.json.
The goal is to complete the group-worker task assigned by group_worker_input.json; /home/yangfp/QCIP/reports/xizi_double_link_next-20260714180011/rounds/xizi_double_link_next-vc-proving-r1/groups/group_00__next_return_by_suffix_cases/group_worker_report.json is only the final report file recording the result.
Before acting, read group_worker_input.json completely and read every skill or rule file listed under handoff.detailed_rules.skill_docs.
The group_worker_input.json, group_workers_manifest.json, declared group worktree, declared source_goal_version, and current files are the source of truth.
Do not rely on parent chat history or unstated assumptions as task context or evidence.
Minimize respawns: solve every assigned witness in this group inside this same spawn whenever the source_goal_version and helper namespace are still current.
Do not stop for confirmation about proof uncertainty, missing optional hints, or a failed tactic; inspect the proof state, try an alternate route, add current-suffix helpers when useful, and re-run the fixed group check.
Work only in the declared group worktree; write only the declared group_worker_report.json, group_worker_output.txt, assigned witness proof bodies, current group-suffixed case_lib helpers, and official Rocq library imports needed by those proofs.
No compromise operations: do not weaken specifications, bypass required checks, fake evidence, change generated files by hand, change witness statements, edit unassigned witnesses, edit seed case_lib declarations, add unsuffixed or foreign-suffix helpers, add non-Rocq/project/generated case_lib imports, add Admitted/Axiom, or use forbidden tools/tactics.
Task completion means the assigned group proof work is completed under the strict workflow, with a terminal group status, solved/unsolved witnesses, blockers or errors, changed-files details, helper/import declarations, source_goal_version-bound Coq evidence, and an output note satisfying output_contract.
Controller/parent verification acceptance is separate; do not claim group acceptance or final proof acceptance unless the controller writes it.
Reuse only references explicitly declared in group_worker_input.json; previous output notes are non-authoritative and lose conflicts to JSON, manifests, source versions, and current files.
Compact-error is not your blocked judgment; report it only as a compaction fact and let controller/main decide retry or final blocker.
If the strict workflow cannot be completed, write a blocked, stale, or compact-error result with concrete evidence instead of improvising around the process.

formal_edit_rules.proof_manual: edit assigned witness proof bodies only
formal_edit_rules.case_lib: add proved helper declarations and official Rocq library imports only; every new helper name must end with helper_namespace.suffix; new imports must be Require Import Coq.* or From Coq... Require Import ...
